build_scope: Implement the next eligible planned phase end-to-end. Use 'build all' only when every remaining phase should be attempted sequentially.

merge_policy.increment_strategy: one reviewable pull request per increment

autonomy_policy.default: Proceed without clarification using the approved plan and repository conventions.
stop_only_for: missing or invalid production secrets or credentials
external legal, security, privacy, or provider approval explicitly required by an entry gate
a destructive or irreversible migration whose safety cannot be established
a failing main branch or platform outage that prevents trustworthy verification
a requested action outside the approved phase scope or safety boundaries
never_claim: production authorization without the documented external gates
successful tests or deployment that did not run
a push or merge that was not confirmed on remote main

phases.name: Reviewed matter overview and attorney-controlled response planning
phases.objective: Create source-bound narrative and planning views only from attorney-approved structured artifacts.
entry_gates: Phase 4 repository implementation and CI are green
Phase 4 evaluation passes calibrated source-pair, material-omission, precision, recall, and review-time gates
Phase 1 production security gates are independently satisfied before confidential use
legal practitioners approve overview and planning terminology
exit_gates: Every narrative sentence and outline node resolves to approved structured support and executable source links
Zero unsupported material factual statements in the frozen evaluation packs
Upstream corrections invalidate affected overview and planning snapshots
Attorney approval is version-specific and cannot be inherited silently
Lawyer review time improves without increasing material omissions

phases.name: Verified legal authority research
phases.objective: Add a separate, verifiable authority-research system that never mixes legal authorities with matter evidence.
entry_gates: approved authority sources, licences, provider terms, and retention policies are documented
jurisdiction, court, date, and authority-status metadata requirements are approved
live provider credentials are available or provider-neutral fixtures are explicitly accepted for repository-only implementation

increments.name: Authority source registry and query contract

exit_gates: Every authority citation opens the exact verified source location
Matter evidence and external authority stores remain logically and visibly separate
No fabricated authority identifiers, quotations, courts, dates, or treatments in evaluation packs
Material research conclusions require attorney review
Provider and licence conditions are enforced by source registry policy

phases.name: Controlled drafting, collaboration, and export
phases.objective: Turn approved plans and authorities into collaborative, versioned attorney drafts with strict approval and export controls.
entry_gates: Phase 6 authority verification and evaluation gates pass
document templates and jurisdiction-specific export requirements are approved
privilege, confidentiality, support-access, and collaboration policies are approved
the organization defines who may draft, review, approve, and export

increments.name: Versioned drafting workspace
deliverables: draft sections from approved outline nodes

exit_gates: No draft is represented as filing-ready without named attorney approval of the exact version
Every material factual and legal proposition has valid approved support or a visible unresolved marker
Exports are reproducible from an immutable manifest
Permissions, privilege boundaries, and audit history survive collaboration and export
Draft review demonstrates measurable time savings without increased correction severity

phases.name: Production pilot and general-availability readiness
phases.objective: Harden, deploy, operate, and evaluate Casewise as a controlled design-partner product with explicit proceed, pivot, or stop gates.
entry_gates: Phase 7 product and evaluation gates pass
approved production cloud accounts, regions, secrets, domains, and provider contracts exist
design partners and permissible pilot matters are confirmed
incident, privacy, retention, deletion, support-access, and commercial terms are approved
exit_gates: Independent security and isolation testing passes
Deletion, restoration, incident, and provider-failure drills pass
Pilot quality and time-saved metrics meet approved thresholds
Unit economics and operational support load are acceptable
Named product, legal, security, and business owners approve the 1.0 decision

optional_expansion.rule: Optional expansion begins only after the Phase 8 launch decision and must receive its own scoped plan and evaluation gates.
